$description: Component tokens for Mobile Input Form component - a composite form component that includes label, input field, hint text, and optional action button. Supports multiple states including default (neutral), success, destructive (error), and warning variants across 3 sizes (sm, md, lg). Figma Reference: Node ID 7-22883

$component.name: Input Form
$component.description: A mobile form component that combines label, input field, hint text, and optional action button into a cohesive form structure. Provides complete form field styling with validation states, spacing, and typography for mobile interfaces. Supports multiple semantic states for different types of feedback.
$component.structure: Vertical container with label at top, input field in middle, hint text below, and optional action button aligned with label

sizes.3xs: Extra small size for compact mobile interfaces - typically 8px-9px
sizes.2xs: Extra small size for compact mobile interfaces - typically 10px-11px
sizes.xs: Small size for compact mobile interfaces - typically 12px-13px
sizes.sm: Small size for compact mobile interfaces - typically 12px-13px
sizes.md: Medium size (commonly used default for mobile) - typically 13px-14px
sizes.lg: Large size for prominent mobile forms - typically 14px-16px

variants.default: Neutral form with gray colors for standard data entry
variants.success: Success state with green colors for positive validation feedback
variants.destructive: Error state with red colors for validation errors and warnings
variants.warning: Warning state with orange/yellow colors for cautionary messages
variants.disabled: Disabled state with muted colors when form is disabled

usage.contexts: Mobile forms, registration screens, login forms, settings panels, data entry interfaces, profile forms, search forms
usage.features: Label with optional action button, Input field with validation states, Hint text for guidance, Spacing between elements, Focus states, Disabled states

gap.$comment: Spacing tokens for mobile input form - defines gaps between label, input field, and hint text
gap.description: Mobile input form gap for 3xs size - gap between label, input, and hint text - 4px

label.$comment: Label tokens for mobile input form - includes typography, colors, and spacing

3xs.description: Mobile input form label typography for 3xs size - Medium 11px/16px

2xs.description: Mobile input form label typography for 2xs size - Medium 12px/17px

xs.description: Mobile input form label typography for xs size - Medium 13px/18px

sm.description: Mobile input form label typography for sm size - Medium 14px/20px

md.description: Mobile input form label typography for md size - Medium 16px/24px

lg.description: Mobile input form label typography for lg size - Medium 16px/24px

default.description: Mobile input form label default text color - gray/600 - #475467

spacing.description: Mobile input form label bottom spacing for sm size - space between label and input - 4px

height.$comment: Mobile input form input field heights for each size variant

3xs.description: Mobile input form input height for 3xs size - 24px

2xs.description: Mobile input form input height for 2xs size - 28px

xs.description: Mobile input form input height for xs size - 32px

sm.description: Mobile input form input height for sm size - 36px

md.description: Mobile input form input height for md size - 40px

lg.description: Mobile input form input height for lg size - 44px

action.$comment: Action button tokens for mobile input form - optional button aligned with label (e.g., 'Forgot password?', 'Clear')

sm.description: Mobile input form action button typography for sm size - Semibold 14px/20px

md.description: Mobile input form action button typography for md size - Semibold 16px/20px

lg.description: Mobile input form action button typography for lg size - Semibold 16px/20px

primary.description: Mobile input form action button primary text color - primary/700 - #004EEB

neutral.description: Mobile input form action button neutral text color - gray/700 - #344054

spacing.$comment: Spacing tokens for mobile input form action button - defines space on the left side when aligned with label

sm.description: Mobile input form action button left spacing for sm size - space between label and action button - 8px

md.description: Mobile input form action button left spacing for md size - space between label and action button - 8px

lg.description: Mobile input form action button left spacing for lg size - space between label and action button - 12px
